target: 50. The One Who Should Have Disappeared
Mio Kofune
The number you have dialed is either out of the service area or turned off, and cannot be reached…
(Shin-chan, where are you…? He said he was going to meet Sou-kun, but Sou-kun is also out of range… And Tokiko isn't answering either…)

…Shin-chan…
Come back soon…
(Shadow Sickness… Sis died… Shiori-chan disappeared too…)
(If something happens to Shin-chan too…!!)

(Did I just hear something…?
Could it be…)
Shin-chan!?
Eh!! Shiori-chan…!?
Over here… Shinpei-san is… over here…
W-Wait!!!
Whoa!!?
Uwaaaah!!
Whoa!! M-Mio-chan!?
Oh, Tetsu-san! S-Sorry!!
You can't just jump out like that! What's wrong, you look pale...
J-Just now, Shiori-chan...! Did you see Shiori-chan!?
Eh!!? Did you find her!? Eh? Where! Where!?
She went running the way Tetsu-san came from...
What!? The only one running this way was you, Mio-chan—
Shiori-chan!?
Ah. …Sh-She vanished!?
It was around here, right…? What the…?
Ah! This manhole cover is out of place...
(Shiori-chan was pointing at the ground before she disappeared just now...)
(What does this mean!? Is Shin-chan in here!?)
…Tetsu-san.
No, no, no, no, no, no, no, no! No way, no way, no way, no way, no way!!
You must have misseen it! There's no way a little girl would go in there!
…Well, normally…
(But… what if that was Shiori-chan's shadow!?)
Tetsu-san...
I'm not doing it.
I haven't even said anything yet!!
Ya want me to check inside, right?
No way, I don't have time for that! I'm a busy guy. I was just about to go drinking at Miyako!!
If my cool uniform gets smelly or stained, Erika-chan will hate me!
So drinks are worth more than a human life?
Ugh! W-Well, I mean, that was...
It'd be a great achievement, you know...?
The cop who found the missing girl, you might even get in the newspaper... you'd be famous. I bet Erika-chan would see you in a new light...
But if you don't want to, that's fine. It's useless to try and stop me... I'll go alone—
Wait a minute!!!!
Mio-chan, stick close to me.
…Hey, it's not about getting a reward or wanting to be popular, alright!? Don't get the wrong idea!
I'm just doing this as a Hero of Justice! I just want to find Shiori-chan!!
…Thank you. Hypocrisy in action is better than inaction, right!
Ain't that a little harsh, Mio-chan?
